title: Login successfully and reach the correct dashboard for the user role
description: Verifies an existing user can log in with valid credentials and is redirected to the appropriate role-based dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on an authenticated dashboard appropriate to their role

title: Register as a candidate and get auto-logged in to the candidate dashboard
description: Verifies a public visitor can complete candidate registration with valid details and is auto-logged in to the candidate dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Select candidate account type
Fill a first name into the first name field
Fill a last name into the last name field
Fill a unique email into the email field
Fill a strong password into the password field
Submit the registration form
Verify the user lands on the candidate dashboard in an authenticated state

title: Forgot password request shows privacy-preserving confirmation
description: Verifies submitting the forgot-password form shows a generic confirmation message that does not reveal whether the email exists.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Choose the forgot password flow
Fill unknown.or.known@example.com into the email field
Submit the forgot password request
Verify a generic password reset confirmation message is visible

title: Choose a role from landing and start registration
description: Verifies a public visitor can navigate from the landing page into the registration flow and reach account type selection.

steps.description: Navigate to /landing
Click the call to action to create an account
Wait for the registration page to load
Verify the registration page shows account type selection options

title: Register a new company with recruiter admin and reach recruiter/company dashboard
description: Verifies a public visitor can create a company-admin recruiter account with company details and is auto-logged in to the recruiter/company dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Select the company/recruiter creating company account type
Fill Alice into the admin first name field
Fill Admin into the admin last name field
Fill company.admin.alice@example.com into the admin email field
Fill a strong valid password into the admin password field
Fill Acme Staffing LLC into the company name field
Fill 1234567890 into the company tax number field
Submit the registration form
Verify the user lands on the recruiter/company dashboard

title: Register as invited recruiter with invite code and reach recruiter dashboard
description: Verifies an invited recruiter can register with an invite code and is auto-logged in to the recruiter dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Select the recruiter (join via invite) account type
Fill Jordan into the first name field
Fill Joiner into the last name field
Fill invited.jordan@example.com into the email field
Fill a strong valid password into the password field
Fill a valid invite code into the invite code field
Submit the registration form
Verify the user lands on the recruiter dashboard

title: Navigate from landing to login
description: Verifies a public visitor can navigate from the landing page to the login page and see the login form.

steps.description: Navigate to /landing
Click the sign-in entry point
Wait for the login page to load
Verify the login form is displayed

title: Show validation when email format is invalid on login
description: Verifies the login form prevents submission and shows an email format validation error when the email is malformed.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with invalid-email-format
Fill in the password field with any-password
Submit the login form
Verify an email format validation error is visible

title: Invite-code registration blocks submit when invite code is missing
description: Verifies an invited recruiter cannot register without providing an invite code and sees a client-side validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Select the recruiter (join via invite) account type
Fill Riley into the first name field
Fill Recruiter into the last name field
Fill invited.riley@example.com into the email field
Fill a strong valid password into the password field
Submit the registration form
Verify an invite code validation error is visible

title: Reject weak password during candidate registration
description: Verifies candidate registration blocks submission and shows a password strength validation error when a weak password is entered.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Select candidate account type
Fill a first name into the first name field
Fill a last name into the last name field
Fill a unique email into the email field
Fill a weak password into the password field
Submit the registration form
Verify a password strength validation error is visible

title: Forgot password rejects malformed email format
description: Verifies the forgot-password form blocks submission for malformed emails and shows a client-side email format validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Choose the forgot password flow
Fill not-an-email into the email field
Submit the forgot password request
Verify an email format validation error is visible
